case_title: SAMUEL S. LEE VS. SUM LAI

ORDER ON JUDGEMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-09-2010 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-09-2010 BY COMM. PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, SAMUEL S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAI, SUM DBA SUM'S MOBILE AUTO REPAIR $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $850.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
